Info

Defines abstract class IInfoManager with method(s). Interface for the ATS info manager mechanism.

class ats_utilities.info.imanager.IInfoManager[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IInfoManager with method(s). Interface for the ATS info manager mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:

None.

methods:
get_shared_context - Returns the shared context.
set_info - Sets the ATS information.
get_info - Gets the ATS information.
info_ok - Checks if ATS information structure is ok.
refresh_status - Refreshes status for ATS information structure.
__str__ - Returns the ATS info manager as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract get_info() → dict[str, Any][source]¶

Gets the ATS information.

Returns:

Dictionary with ATS information.

Return type:

<dict[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract get_shared_context() → ContextBundle | None[source]¶

Returns the shared context.

Returns:

Shared context | None.

Return type:

<ContextBundle | None>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if ATS information structure is ok.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract refresh_status() → None[source]¶

Refreshes status for ATS information structure.

Exceptions:

None.

abstract set_info(info: dict[str, Any]) → None[source]¶

Sets the ATS information.

Parameters:

info (<dict[str, Any]>) – Dictionary with ATS information

Exceptions:

None.
